com.ez.sho-metrics.catalog-metric.Name: Advanced Sensor
com.ez.sho-metrics.catalog-metric.Tooltip: Displays one selected metric, such as LibreHardwareMonitor data.

com.ez.sho-metrics.dense-multi-metric.Name: Dense Multi Metric
com.ez.sho-metrics.dense-multi-metric.Tooltip: Displays multiple metrics in one compact view.

com.ez.sho-metrics.stacked-metric.Name: Stacked Metric
com.ez.sho-metrics.stacked-metric.Tooltip: Rotates between multiple metric widgets on one key.
